Garchomp (OU): Garchomp is one of the best Pokémon in OU with base 130 Attack and base 102 Speed. The standard Swords Dance set uses Earthquake as primary Ground STAB, Dragon Claw or Outrage for Dragon STAB, and Fire Blast or Stone Edge for coverage against Steel-types. Rough Skin punishes contact moves. Rocky Helmet amplifies this chip damage. Scale Shot is an alternative Dragon move that raises Speed. Garchomp appreciates Stealth Rock support and fits well on balanced and offensive teams.
Pikachu (PU): Pikachu is a niche threat in PU thanks to its Light Ball item which doubles both Attack and Special Attack. Volt Tackle is the primary physical move despite recoil. Thunderbolt provides reliable special Electric STAB. Iron Tail targets Rock and Ice types. Quick Attack priority helps against weakened opponents. Pikachu's 90 base Speed is decent but it is frail and struggles against faster threats.
Charizard (UU): Charizard is a fearsome wallbreaker in UU. The Belly Drum set with Sitrus Berry and Extreme Speed is one of the most threatening win conditions. Fire Blast and Flare Blitz are the main Fire STAB options. Air Slash or Hurricane serve as secondary Flying STAB. Solar Beam provides coverage in sun. Its Blaze ability provides emergency power below one third HP. Stealth Rock weakness is a significant drawback requiring Rapid Spin or Defog support.
